title: Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences Faculty Board
content:
Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences Faculty Board

ARTICLE 9

a) Establishment and Operation:

1.

The Faculty Board consists of three professors, two associate professors and one assistant professor among faculty members, associate professors and professors within the faculty selected by heads of the related departments under the presidency of the dean,

2. The Faculty Board holds regular meetings at the beginning and end of the semester.

3.

Dean calls a faculty board meeting if it is deemed necessary.

b)

Duties:

The Faculty Board is an academic organ and its duties are listed below:

1.

To determine education-training, scientific research and publications activities; related rules, plans, programs and education-training calendar for these activities,

2.

To select members for the Faculty Governing Board

3.

To carry out other duties within the Law and legislation.

HUMANITIES and SOCIAL SCIENCES FACULTY BOARD
